summary: Thirteen military equipment targets were assessed: twelve are DAMAGED (PROBABLE confidence) and one is DESTROYED (CONFIRMED). The scene depicts a long line of military trucks parked along a road, many showing battle damage including shattered windshields, deformed bumpers, and scattered debris, with one vehicle in the foreground appearing completely destroyed. The overall functional impact is likely severe, as the assessed targets are non-operational and appear to have been disabled by combat.
